comment: Faculty in computer science explains core subjects clearly and gives practical lab assignments.
Good campus and disciplined environment. Hostel wifi speed drops at night.
Electronics labs are updated and assistants are helpful during project work.
Course content is good but timetable changes are frequent and confusing.
Placement training starts early and aptitude sessions are useful.
Mechanical workshop facilities are solid and safety rules are followed.
Administrative queue is very slow during exam form submission week.
replyText: We are digitizing exam form verification to reduce waiting time next cycle.

comment: Coding club and hackathon culture make this institute stand out.
Library timing is convenient and reference books are mostly available.
Final year project mentoring is strong and professors are approachable.
Syllabus delivery is decent but industrial visits should be more frequent.
Excellent peer learning environment and active technical societies.
Civil engineering field work exposure is good for practical understanding.
Internship cell helped me get an internship in my second year.
Campus is green and clean. Food court options could be expanded.
Exam results were delayed and communication from office was poor.
replyText: We regret the delay. A revised publication schedule is now publicly posted.

comment: Teachers support startup ideas and give extra guidance outside class hours.
Good attendance tracking system and transparent internal marks.
Robotics lab equipment is modern and frequently used by students.
Academics are fine but interdepartment coordination can improve.
Strong alumni network and regular career talks from industry mentors.
Hostel rooms are decent and wardens are responsive.
Good balance of theory and practical sessions across semesters.
Parking space for day scholars is limited during peak hours.
Excellent support for gate exam prep and higher studies guidance.
Lab attendance policy is strict but helps maintain discipline.
The annual tech fest is very well organized and student led.
Reasonable fee structure compared to facilities offered.
Campus transport runs on time but route coverage is limited.
Overall a strong BTech institute for placements, labs, and mentorship.
